text:
The codes are to 
help clearly delineate between acute care and long-term care provided in the home and community 
setting (e.g., 1915(c), 1915(i), 1915(j), and 1915(k) services). 

SHORT NAME: HCBS_SRVC_CD 

LONG NAME: HCBS_SRVC_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): OT line 

VALUES: 1 = The HCBS service was provided under 1915(i) 
2 = The HCBS service was provided under 1915(j) 
3 = The HCBS service was provided under 1915(k) 
4 = The HCBS service
